data.title: Andrew Reynolds promoted to Partner in Bespoke Partners' Go-to-Market Practice, recognizing his client impact and leadership.
data.description: In San Diego, Bespoke Partners, a top executive search firm for private equity portfolio companies, revealed the promotion of Andrew Reynolds as Partner in the Go-to-Market Practice. This recognition highlights his exceptional performance, client contributions, and leadership at the company. Andrew expressed his satisfaction with his four-year journey at Bespoke, where he assisted clients in securing vital sales, marketing, and customer success executives.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer named Maria Montenegro as CEO of Corporate Performance & ESG division.
data.description: Today, Wolters Kluwer has named Maria Montenegro as the CEO of its Corporate Performance & ESG (CP & ESG) division.

data.title: TEN Ltd. (NYSE: TEN) featured in TIME Magazine Europe for its role in sustainable operations in global trade.
data.description: In Athens, Greece on January 9, 2026, TEN Ltd. (NYSE: TEN), a prominent crude, product, and LNG tanker operator, was highlighted in TIME Magazine Europe. The issue delved into the increasing utilization of AI and technology, as well as the shipping sector's shift towards sustainable practices in worldwide trade.

data.title: UNITS Moving CEO donates $5,000 to Wounded Warrior Project at 2025 conference in Charleston, SC.
data.description: During the 2025 UNITS Franchising Group Leadership Conference in Charleston, South Carolina on January 9, 2026, Michael McAlhany, CEO of UNITS Moving and Portable Storage, made a significant contribution of $5,000 to the Wounded Warrior Project. This donation highlights the company's enduring dedication to supporting veterans and showcases their continued commitment to philanthropy.

data.title: Earth Observation Small Satellite Market to reach $5.52B by 2030, growing at 15.9% CAGR from $2.64B in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 9, 2026, it has been reported by MarketsandMarkets™ that the Earth Observation Small Satellite Market is expected to increase significantly. The market, which was valued at USD 2.64 billion in 2025, is projected to reach USD 5.52 billion by 2030, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 15.9%. data.title: SimpleC, a digital health leader, introduces Wellby, an AI caregiver companion, at CES 2026. Wellby offers emotional support and guidance 24/7 as part of the Connected Care platform.
data.description: Wellby, a caregiver companion, is now offered as part of SimpleC's Connected Care platform, providing round-the-clock emotional support and guidance for users. SimpleC, known for its digital health solutions for older adults and caregivers, unveiled this service at CES.

data.title: ECD Automotive Design and Chelsea Truck Company team up, producing factory-new Defender 110 V8 among other vehicles.
data.description: A brand-new Defender 110 V8 manufactured in the factory is part of the collaboration between ECD and CTC, symbolizing the beginning of a new phase. Numerous vehicles, including this Defender, have been produced as part of this partnership.

data.title: Nicklaus Children's Hospital in Miami wins 4th consecutive Top Children's Hospital award for quality and safety by The Leapfrog Group.
data.description: A hospital in Miami, Nicklaus Children's, was recently recognized for its excellence in patient safety and quality, receiving the prestigious title of Top Children's Hospital from The Leapfrog Group. This honor is highly competitive and showcases the hospital's national acclaim in delivering high-quality healthcare. The award highlights the hospital's outstanding achievements in maintaining a safe environment for patients.

data.title: KalVista Pharmaceuticals' new drug Ekterly for HAE sees early sales success. Growing prescriber adoption and repeat prescriptions post-mid-2025 launch. Stock nears resistance levels, hitting new highs after FDA approval.
data.description: KalVista Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: KALV) announced that their hereditary angioedema treatment, EKTERLY, has been experiencing strong early commercial success since its launch in mid-2025. The treatment has seen a significant increase in prescriber adoption, repeat prescriptions, and improved global accessibility. In July 2025, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) granted approval for Ekterly to be used in adult and pediatric patients aged 12 years and above for acute attacks of hereditary angioedema. The stock of KalVista Pharmaceuticals is now nearing important resistance levels, with the company's positive performance leading to a new high. For additional details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Teremana Tequila and Wingstop partner to celebrate fans, offering ultimate game day flavor fest. NEW YORK Jan. 9, 2026.
data.description: A collaboration between Teremana® Tequila, created by Dwayne Johnson, and Wingstop has been announced in New York on January 9, 2026. This partnership will offer a combination of wings, cocktails, and an opportunity to win the Ultimate Game Day Flavor Fest. Wingstop, a renowned global brand, is known for its delectable wings. The partnership aims to bring together the best of both worlds for fans. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting collaboration.

The EU executive has ordered Elon Musk's Grok to keep data related to the AI chatbot after the tool sparked a backlash for generating sexualized deepfakes of minors. The order means the EU executive can ask X for access to the documents as it looks into the platform and Grok.

data.title: Ben Hopper appointed as Senior VP at First Horizon Bank to head Consumer Distribution and ATM Strategy.
data.description: First Horizon Bank based in Memphis, Tennessee shared on January 8, 2026 that Ben Hopper has been appointed as the Senior Vice President, Head of Consumer Distribution and ATM Strategy. Hopper, an addition to the team, will spearhead initiatives aimed at improving the strategies for consumer distribution and ATM services within First Horizon. This announcement comes as First Horizon continues to enhance its services for its customers.
